zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Richmond於1401年出生在英國藍卡爾霍格頓時，她的父親Richard Richmond55歲，母親Jane de Houghton46歲。她和Richard de Houghton至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1438年2月15日在英國藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Richmond于1401年出生在英国藍卡爾霍格頓时，她的父亲Richard Richmond55岁，母亲Jane de Houghton46岁。她和Richard de Houghton至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1438年2月15日在英国藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richmond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Richmond (North Yorkshire). The placename was probably transferred after the Norman Conquest from any of numerous places in France named with Old French riche ‘mighty, strong’ + munt, mont ‘mountain, hill’. Richmond in southwest London received this name only in the reign of Henry VII, in honor of the king, who had been Earl of Richmond until he came to the throne, and is unlikely to be the source of this surname.
occasionally a variant of Richman , with excrescent -d. The two names were probably often confused.

variants.name: Richman
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Richeman, either from an unrecorded Old English Rīcmann, or from a pet form of Richard + the hypocoristic suffix -man. The name was sometimes interchangeable with Rickman , especially in recent times.
English: occasionally perhaps a nickname from Middle English riche ‘rich, powerful’ + -man. Compare Rich .
English: perhaps a variant of   Richmond  , or vice versa.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Richmond was born in 1401, in Hoghton, Lancashire, England, her father, Richard Richmond, was 55 and her mother, Jane de Houghton, was 46. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Richard de Houghton. She died on 15 February 1438, in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Richmond est née en 1401, à Hoghton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Richmond, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Jane de Houghton, avait 46 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Richard de Houghton. Elle est décédée le 15 février 1438, à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Richmond 1401 in Hoghton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Richmond 55 und ihre Mutter Jane de Houghton 46. Sie hatte mit Richard de Houghton mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Februar 1438 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Richmond è nata il nel 1401 nel Hoghton, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Richard Richmond, aveva 55 anni e sua madre, Jane de Houghton, aveva 46 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Richard de Houghton. Morì il 15 febbraio 1438, nel Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Richmondが1401年にイギリスランカシュアイアホートンで生まれた時，父Richard Richmondは55歳，母Jane de Houghtonは46歳であった。彼女はRichard de Houghtonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1438年2月15日にイギリスランカシュアイアサムレスブリーで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Richmond(이)가 1401년 영국 랭카실르 호그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Richmond(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane de Houghton(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 Richard de Houghton(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1438년 2월 15일 영국 랭카실르 샘레스버이에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Richmond nasceu em 1401, em Hoghton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Richmond, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Jane de Houghton, tinha 46 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Richard de Houghton. Ela faleceu em 15 de fevereiro de 1438, em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Richmond родилась в 1401 г. в местности хогтон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Richmond было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane de Houghton, 46. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Richard de Houghton. Она умерла 15 февраля 1438 г. в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Richmond nació en 1401, en Hoghton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Richmond, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Jane de Houghton, tenía 46 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Richard de Houghton. Murió el 15 de febrero de 1438, en Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años.
